reasoning: Addressing the lactate clearance limiter is key here. Your last ride showed a steady effort but there’s still a gap in maintaining higher power outputs over time. Tackling Emigration Canyon with structured over-unders mirrors the demands of the Alpine Loop, prepping you for the sustained climb with improved fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 10 min over-unders: 2 min at 242-256W, 2 min at 201-218W, repeated for 3 intervals each set with 3 min recovery between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
